name: Paul Rodriguez
bio: Paul Rodriguez is a Mexican-American stand-up comedian and actor, often called a pioneer of Latino comedy in the United States. Honing his act at The Comedy Store, he built a long career across stand-up, sitcoms, and film, and produced the 2002 concert film The Original Latin Kings of Comedy. Comedy Central ranked him among its 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of all time in 2004.

timeline.ev: Begins his comedy and acting career
Stars in the ABC sitcom a.k.a. Pablo
Tapes a special live from San Quentin State Prison
Produces The Original Latin Kings of Comedy
Named to Comedy Central's 100 Greatest Stand-Ups list

accolades: Comedy Central 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time, ranked No. 74 in 2004
Produced the concert film The Original Latin Kings of Comedy
Part-owner of the Laugh Factory comedy club
